mapper.select: SELECT id, book_title, author, publisher, isbn, customer_name, customer_phone, status, note, created_at, resolved_at FROM book_reservation ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, book_title, author, publisher, isbn, customer_name, customer_phone, status, note, created_at, resolved_at FROM book_reservation WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book_reservation (book_title, author, publisher, isbn, customer_name, customer_phone, status, note, created_at) VALUES (#{bookTitle}, #{author}, #{publisher}, #{isbn}, #{customerName}, #{customerPhone}, #{status}, #{note}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE book_reservation SET status = #{status}, resolved_at = #{resolvedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
